## getNotebookStatus() function

Reports the artifacts (Audio Overviews, …) in a notebook's Studio panel with a best-effort `type`<!-- -->/`state`<!-- -->. AppleScript transport only (macOS).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function getNotebookStatus(options: NotebookStatusOptions): Promise<NotebookStatusResult>;
```
